compiled_state.title: Add Rule 5 (instruction-file testing boundary) to behavioral-testing-standard.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add Rule 5 to plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md defining the testing boundary for non-executable artifacts (skills, prompts, agent definitions, hook behavioral logic). Rule 5 must:

1. Define that non-executable LLM instruction files are tested ONLY at the deterministic integration interface: contract schema validation, referential integrity, shim compliance, syntax checks, deployment prerequisites (test -x)
2. Explicitly list acceptable structural test categories for instruction files
3. Explicitly prohibit test -f existence checks and grep-based content assertions as change-detector tests for instruction file content
4. NOT demand behavioral correctness assertions for LLM instruction content (which cannot be deterministically tested)

Update the standard's preamble from "4-rule" references to "5-rule" where applicable. Update the Usage by Test-Writing Agents section to include Rule 5 in the workflow.

Ensure structural test categories do NOT contradict the pre-commit test quality gate's anti-pattern rules.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md (modify)
- tests/hooks/test-behavioral-testing-standard-rule5.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] behavioral-testing-standard.md contains "## Rule 5" section heading
  Verify: grep -q "## Rule 5" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
- [ ] Rule 5 defines testing boundary for non-executable artifacts
  Verify: grep -q "non-executable" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
- [ ] Rule 5 lists acceptable structural test categories
  Verify: grep -q "contract schema\|referential integrity\|shim compliance\|syntax check" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
- [ ] Rule 5 prohibits test -f and grep-based content assertions
  Verify: grep -q "prohibit\|NOT acceptable" plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/behavioral-testing-standard.md
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-behavioral-testing-standard-rule5.sh

My new test test-behavioral-testing-standard-rule5.sh: 12/12 pass.
